flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at West Virginia State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $9.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Virginia State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at West Virginia State University rose 72% between 2021 and 2024 (17.7% → 30.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Virginia State University rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (29.6% → 39.2%).
